description: Restaurant showcases signature menu items with location pin, operational hours, and dish recommendations, followed by itemized bill transparency in final image.
structural_recipe: 1) Open with restaurant name and 📍location tag 2) List service hours (breakfast through specified closing time) 3) Highlight 2-3 signature dishes with descriptive names and premium ingredients 4) Use '+' notation to show dish combinations 5) Close with 'الفاتورة في الصورة الاخيرة' (bill in final image) 6) Include actual itemized receipt as final carousel image for price transparency
why_it_works: Saudi diners value transparency in pricing and authenticity of recommendations. Showing the actual bill builds trust and allows followers to assess value. Signature dish callouts create FOMO and give followers specific items to order. Location tagging increases local discoverability.
transplantation_caveats: Bill transparency may not work equally in all markets with different pricing sensitivities
Signature dish naming should reflect local flavor preferences and ingredient familiarity
Operational hours format should align with local time conventions
cultural_constraints: Breakfast service hours extend to 6 PM (non-traditional timing reflects Saudi work schedules)
Arabic-language operational details essential for local audience
Bill transparency indicates honest pricing culture valued in Saudi F&B market
